channel.title: Edgar's Personal Wiki
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Edgar's Personal Wiki

item.title: Edgar's Personal Wiki
item.description: Edgar’s Personal Wiki Public notebook This is the public edge of a private working wiki: source-backed notes about software, systems, books, institutions, and the moments where fiction explains reality better than reality explains itself.

item.title: belief-change
item.description: Belief Change Belief change, in the ingested YANSS episodes, depends on evidence and on whether a person can absorb the social consequences of accepting it.

item.title: cipher-and-intelligence-in-quicksilver
item.description: Cipher and Intelligence in Quicksilver Quicksilver broadens intelligence from formal cryptography into a network of signals: vagabond gossip, courier routes, coffee-house messages, market prices, diplomatic staging, intercepted letters, and Gottfried Wilhelm Leibniz’s cipher teaching.

item.title: distributed-systems
item.description: Distributed Systems Distributed systems are systems whose correctness and performance depend on communication among multiple machines, processes, or replicas.

item.title: eliza-commercial-intelligence
item.description: Eliza’s Commercial Intelligence Eliza’s Book Two power in Quicksilver is commercial intelligence: the ability to read how goods, money, social roles, letters, and rumors can be converted into leverage.

item.title: engineering-career-growth
item.description: Engineering Career Growth Engineering career growth, in the currently ingested Peterman Pod sources, is less about doing more of the same work and more about matching behavior to the next level’s expectations.

item.title: functional-programming
item.description: Functional Programming Functional programming models computation primarily through values and function application rather than mutation and a sequence of state changes.

item.title: misinformation-and-identity
item.description: Misinformation and Identity The ingested YANSS episodes treat misinformation as a problem of inference, source selection, trust, social identity, and information systems.

item.title: programming-language-design
item.description: Programming Language Design Programming language design, in Bjarne Stroustrup’s Peterman Pod episode, is problem-first engineering under constraints rather than an unconstrained search for elegance.

item.title: quicksilver-commerce-and-money
item.description: Quicksilver, Commerce, and Money In Quicksilver, quicksilver is both a material substance and a governing metaphor.
